title: IIM Lucknow Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Research Assistant Posts
description: Indian Institute of Management (IIM) Lucknow has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Research Assistant Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the Post-Graduation can grab this chance and apply for the IIM Lucknow Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
